name: Drawer
summary: Slide-in panel for contextual content and actions without losing main page context.

props.name: maxsize
props.description: Max width (left/right) or height (bottom). Default: 320px or 80vh

criticalNotes: position='right' is most common for forms and details
Always handle onClose to update parent state

basicUsage.webComponent:
...form fields...
Cancel Save
basicUsage.react:
<GoabDrawer
  open={isOpen}
  position="right"
  heading="Edit Record"
  onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
  actions={
    <GoabButtonGroup alignment="end">
      <GoabButton type="tertiary" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}>Cancel</GoabButton>
      <GoabButton type="primary" onClick={handleSave}>Save</GoabButton>
    </GoabButtonGroup>
  }
>
  <form>...form fields...</form>
</GoabDrawer>
basicUsage.angular:
<goab-drawer
  [open]="isOpen"
  position="right"
  heading="Edit Record"
  (onClose)="closeDrawer()">
  <form>...form fields...</form>
  <ng-template #actions>
    <goab-button-group alignment="end">
      <goab-button type="tertiary" (onClick)="closeDrawer()">Cancel</goab-button>
      <goab-button type="primary" (onClick)="save()">Save</goab-button>
    </goab-button-group>
  </ng-template>
</goab-drawer>
